LightningComponentBundle.description: Distributions page: KPI row, ACH-vs-Cheque donut, and batch list. Fetches DistributionsController.getDistributions and opens a per-batch detail modal on row select.

property.name: periodMonths
property.label: Period (months)
property.description: Look-back window in months for 'this period' KPIs. Defaults to 18 so values are non-zero against seed data.
